prompt: Range proxy: choose the best action, not a single-hand snap raise.
why_v1: Call controls risk when range edge is not strong enough to raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits when the range edge is real but not strong enough to build a bigger pot cleanly.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. When the range edge is real but not strong enough to press, this spot should stay controlled with a call.
